short_blurb: Fire-zone-compliant roofing for Calabasas homes and estates.
local_note: Calabasas sits in a Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone — meaning every re-roof must comply with Chapter 7A of the California Building Code: Class A roof assemblies, ember-resistant venting, metal drip edges, and enclosed eaves. We install Title 24 cool-roof assemblies that meet all fire-zone requirements while keeping cooling costs down on larger Calabasas homes.
